name: admin_bans_authed
note: State-dependent (janitor asymmetry): rust has the route and matches shape. Content diverges because mainline's background janitor auto-bans unresponsive hosts detected during GASP sync at docker startup; rust's janitor runs via cron, which wrangler dev explicitly does not fire (warning at wrangler startup: 'Scheduled Workers are not automatically triggered during local development'). Triggering rust's janitor via POST /admin/janitor before the harness would populate the list. Shape parity verified; state parity requires matching sync orchestration.
